name: Cascader
mdSummary:
# Cascader

Multi-level dropdown for hierarchical selection.

**Package:** `Lumeo` · **Category:** Forms/Selection
**Docs:** https://lumeo.nativ.sh/components/cascader

## Parameters
| Owner | Name | Type | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| Cascader | FormField | `FormField.FormFieldContext?` | `` |  |
| Cascader | Value | `List<string>?` | `` |  |
| Cascader | ValueChanged | `EventCallback<List<string>?>` | `` |  |
| Cascader | Options | `List<CascaderOption>?` | `` |  |
| Cascader | Placeholder | `string?` | `` |  |
| Cascader | Disabled | `bool` | `` |  |
| Cascader | Clearable | `bool` | `` |  |
| Cascader | ShowSearch | `bool` | `` |  |
| Cascader | Required | `bool` | `` |  |
| Cascader | Invalid | `bool` | `` |  |
| Cascader | ErrorText | `string?` | `` |  |
| Cascader | HelperText | `string?` | `` |  |
| Cascader | Label | `string?` | `` |  |
| Cascader | Name | `string?` | `` |  |
| Cascader | Class | `string?` | `` |  |
| Cascader | AdditionalAttributes | `Dictionary<string, object>?` | `` |  |

## Slots
- (none)

## Events
- `ValueChanged` (`EventCallback<List<string>?>`)

## Sub-components
- (none)

## Cascading values it expects
- `FormField` (`FormField.FormFieldContext?`)

## Services it injects
- `IComponentInteropService` ()
- `ILumeoLocalizer` (Lumeo.Services.Localization)

## Keyboard
- `Escape` — HandleKeyDown handles Escape in Cascader.razor

## Example
```razor
<Cascader />
```

## CSS variables
`--color-accent`, `--color-accent-foreground`, `--color-background`, `--color-border`, `--color-destructive`, `--color-foreground`, `--color-input`, `--color-muted`, `--color-muted-foreground`, `--color-popover`, `--color-popover-foreground`, `--color-primary`, `--color-ring`, `--radius`
